common.slogan: Find Your Home Food in Korea
common.fileType: This file type is not allowed

home.locationDenied: Location permission is off. Tap here for help.
home.locationUnavailable: Couldn't get your location. Please try again.
home.locationGuideIOS:
1. Open iPhone Settings
2. Privacy & Security → Location Services
3. Find Safari (or your browser) and tap it
4. Choose "While Using the App"
5. Refresh KBite
home.locationGuideOther:
1. Tap the lock icon in your browser's address bar
2. Set Location to "Allow"
3. Refresh the page

partner.premiumOnlyDesc: Upgrade to Premium to unlock detailed visitor analytics — see where your customers come from and when they visit.
partner.menuLockedBasic: Menu management is available on Basic plan and above

partner.resetExpired: This reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you're ready to grow.
pricing.freeDesc: Everything you need to get discovered.
pricing.basicDesc: Grow your presence with more photos and review replies.
pricing.premiumDesc: Full analytics suite and maximum search visibility.
pricing.faq1Q: Is there a contract or commitment?
pricing.faq1A: No. You can cancel anytime from your dashboard.
pricing.faq2Q: When can I upgrade to a paid plan?
pricing.faq2A: Paid plans are launching soon. Register now to secure your listing.
